title: Hybrid Interpretable-Deep Learning Workflow for Vineyard Wildfire Damage Mapping from UAV-RGB Imagery
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un flujo de trabajo híbrido que combina métodos interpretables con deep learning para mapear daños por incendios en viñedos usando imágenes RGB de drones.
abstract: Wildfire damage assessment in agricultural areas requires accurate and interpretable methods. This paper presents a hybrid interpretable-deep learning workflow for mapping vineyard wildfire damage from UAV-RGB imagery. Our approach combines the accuracy of deep learning with the transparency of interpretable methods, enabling both precise damage quantification and understandable results for stakeholders and insurance assessment.

citations.apa: Rodrigo-Comino, J., Domínguez-Rull, J., Xouris, C., Kalogeras, A., Cerdà, A., & Herrera, F. (2026). Hybrid Interpretable-Deep Learning Workflow for Vineyard Wildfire Damage Mapping from UAV-RGB Imagery. The Photogrammetric Record.
citations.mla: Rodrigo-Comino, J., J. Domínguez-Rull, C. Xouris, A. Kalogeras, A. Cerdà, and F. Herrera. "Hybrid Interpretable-Deep Learning Workflow for Vineyard Wildfire Damage Mapping from UAV-RGB Imagery." The Photogrammetric Record, 2026.
